name: The Beige Legend
description: Outsells everything, outruns nothing. Will survive the apocalypse.

name: Herbie's Cousin
description: Round, cheerful, and secretly plotting. Charm over speed.

name: The Drift Sofa
description: A boxy sedan that thinks it's a race car. It's right.

name: Gullwing Grandpa
description: Doors open upward, wallet opens downward. Timeless class.

name: Rear-Engine Rebel
description: Put the engine in the wrong place for 60 years. Still winning.

name: Prancing Pony
description: Loud, red, and allergic to speed limits. Approach with earplugs.

name: Angry Wedge
description: A raging bull with scissor doors and zero chill.

name: The Money Furnace
description: 1001 hp. Burns fuel, tires, and your life savings. Save up.
